original: You’re fighting some kind of monstrous crab-spider made of black metal and grinding gears, equipped with several gnashing claws and drills for extraterrestrial excavation. A pair of glowing red “eyes” - really sensors, and clearly quite powerful - stare down at you, one over the other. The steel beast has no mouth, its lunges and strikes are all accompanied by howls of crackling static across all channels, giving it an almost bestial roar!

original: One of the fuel lines on the mining bot has ruptured, and it has no problem squirting fuel at you in big, floating globs of colorful fluid.
